zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Owain於1130年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方時，她的父親Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales43歲，母親Gwladys ferch Llywarch32歲。她於1145年之後與Hwfa ap Cynwrig在威爾士凱爾納方史爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1197年在威爾士享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Owain was born in 1130, in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, was 43 and her mother, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, was 32. She married Hwfa ap Cynwrig after 1145, in Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1197, in Wales, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Owain est née en 1130, à Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Hwfa ap Cynwrig après 1145, à Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1197, à Galles, à l’âge de 67 ans.

Sie hat nach 1145 in Caernarfonshire, Wales Hwfa ap Cynwrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1197 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Owainが1130年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアケエルナルフォンで生まれた時，父Owain Gwynedd King of all Walesは43歳，母Gwladys ferch Llywarchは32歳であった。1145年以後にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでHwfa ap Cynwrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1197年にウェールズで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Owain(이)가 1130년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 카이른아르폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Llywarch(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1145년 이후 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Hwfa ap Cynwrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 웨일스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wale: трефор ин гиффиллиог, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Owain родилась в 1130 г. в местности каирнарфон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Llywarch, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hwfa ap Cynwrig после 1145 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1197 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 67 лет.

Se casó con Hwfa ap Cynwrig después de 1145, en Caernarfonshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1197, en Gales, a la edad de 67 años.
